parameters.query:
SELECT TOP 1
    e.email_id,
    e.sender_email,
    e.subject,
    e.body,
    s.sentiment_label,
    r.risk_level,
    r.recommended_action
FROM emails e
LEFT JOIN sentiment_analysis s ON e.email_id = s.email_id
LEFT JOIN risk_analysis r ON e.email_id = r.email_id
WHERE s.sentiment_label = 'negative'
   OR r.risk_level IN ('high', 'critical')
ORDER BY e.email_id DESC;

INSERT INTO ai_response_suggestions (
    email_id,
    suggested_response,
    tone,
    approval_status
)
VALUES (
    {{$json.email_id}},
    '{{$json.suggested_response}}',
    '{{$json.tone}}',
    '{{$json.approval_status}}'
);

INSERT INTO workflow_logs (
    workflow_name,
    email_id,
    execution_status,
    log_message
)
VALUES (
    '08 - AI Reply Suggestion',
    {{$json.email_id}},
    'success',
    'AI reply suggestion generated and saved by n8n workflow.'
);
